title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 176.080 - Bonds to be issued pursuant to resolution
text:
176.080.  Bonds to be issued pursuant to resolution. — Bonds may be issued under the provisions of sections 176.010 to 176.080 pursuant to a resolution adopted by the affirmative vote of two-thirds of the members of the governing body of any state educational institution as herein defined, and no other proceedings shall be required therefor.
(L. 1945 p. 1715 § 8)
